title: Gold rallies amid expectations of slower rate hikes from Fed
section_path: Gold rallies amid expectations of slower rate hikes from Fed
section_path_text: Gold rallies amid expectations of slower rate hikes from Fed
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Slowing US inflation saw risk appetite rise sharply across the complex. This increased confidence of demand strengthening as China's reopens its economy. Gold rallied after inflation slowed in the US.
